steps.term: fun G => fun oneG => fun mulG => fun invG => fun H => fun oneH => fun mulH => fun invH => fun f => fun hom_args => @kernel_quotient_to_h_mul.{u,v} G oneG mulG invG H oneH mulH invH f hom_args

fun G => fun H => fun f => @Quotient.indProp.{u} G (@KerSetoid.{u,v} G H f) (fun (q1 : @KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f) => forall (q2 : @KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f), forall (h : @Eq.{succ v} H (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f q1) (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f q2)), @Eq.{succ u} (@KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f) q1 q2) (fun (a : G) => @Quotient.indProp.{u} G (@KerSetoid.{u,v} G H f) (fun (q2 : @KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f) => forall (h : @Eq.{succ v} H (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f a)) (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f q2)), @Eq.{succ u} (@KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f) (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f a) q2) (fun (b : G) => fun (h : @Eq.{succ v} H (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f a)) (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f b))) => @kernel_quotient_sound.{u,v} G H f a b h))

fun G => fun H => fun f => @Quotient.indProp.{u} G (@KerSetoid.{u,v} G H f) (fun (q : @KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f) => @ImagePred.{succ u,succ v} G H f (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f q)) (fun (a : G) => @image_intro.{succ u,succ v} G H f a)

fun G => fun H => fun f => fun y => fun hy => fun P => fun mk => @image_elim.{succ u,succ v} G H f y hy P (fun (a : G) => fun (h : @Eq.{succ v} H (f a) y) => mk (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f a) (@eq_trans.{succ v} H (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f a)) (f a) y (@kernel_quotient_to_h_mk.{u,v} G H f a) h))

fun G => fun oneG => fun mulG => fun invG => fun H => fun oneH => fun mulH => fun invH => fun f => fun hom_args => fun (P : Prop) => fun mk => mk (@first_iso_map_mul.{u,v} G oneG mulG invG H oneH mulH invH f hom_args) (@first_iso_map_injective.{u,v} G H f) (@first_iso_map_hits_image.{u,v} G H f) (@first_iso_map_surj_image.{u,v} G H f)
